news.headline: These 4 Bitcoin charts say BTC price is forming a bottom
Bitcoin takes aim at $74,000. Surprisingly, the dollar's rallying too.
UAE central bank says financial system stable amid missile and drone attacks

Coinbase execs face new lawsuit seeking damages, insider profit clawbacks
Trump-backed American Bitcoin board members scoop up stock following earnings
Reform UK tops donations with millions from Thailand-based crypto investor: Report
Andreessen Horowitz crypto arm said to seek $2 billion for fifth fund: Fortune
